## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview with Andrew Reese for a Founding Account Executive role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Andrew has relevant experience selling to marketers at Miro and Canva, with a focus on enterprise deals](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [GrowthX's unique model combines AI-powered content creation with high-quality strategic services](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [The company is in an exciting growth phase, transitioning from founder-led sales to building out the sales team](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [GrowthX recently launched their own platform, opening up new opportunities for product development and go-to-market strategies](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)

## Topics

### Andrew's Background and Experience

  - [Founding AE at Miro, selling to enterprise accounts (1000+ employees, Fortune 500)](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [Strategic AE at Canva, focusing on Fortune 500 accounts](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Typical deal cycles: 6-12 months for enterprise, with 9-12 months for strategic deals](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Experience selling to various marketing roles: CMOs, creative operations, content marketing, product marketing, MarTech](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)

### GrowthX's Current State and Challenges

  - [Transitioning from founder-led sales to building out the sales team](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [High inbound interest, but need to scale sales capacity](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [Recently launched their own platform, moving away from Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)
  - [Balancing services with potential self-serve options in the future](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Rapid deal cycles (some closing in 2 calls) compared to typical enterprise sales](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)

### GrowthX's Unique Value Proposition

  - [Combination of AI-powered content creation and high-quality strategic services](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [Experienced team providing insights across multiple accounts](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Ability to create custom, experiential content (e.g., Vappy use case with interactive AI agents)](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)
  - [Focus on driving tangible business outcomes for clients](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)

### Market Dynamics and Opportunities

  - [Emerging field of "generative engine optimization" (GEO/AISEO)](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=2263.0)
  - [Partnerships with tools like Scrunch for SEO analysis](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=2296.0)
  - [Potential to expand into various AI-powered use cases beyond content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=2642.0)

### Sales Process and Strategy

  - [Need to refine the sales process as the company grows and moves upmarket](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Opportunity to implement more nurture touchpoints and leave-behinds](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)
  - [Potential to leverage AI agents (like Vappy) in the sales process](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=2881.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to discuss Andrew's candidacy with Bridget and Tucker](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
  - [Follow up with Andrew regarding next steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [Continue refining GrowthX's go-to-market strategy and product roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)
  - [Explore opportunities to enhance the sales process with AI-powered tools and nurture sequences](https://fathom.video/share/Q1_fez5A7qBksGFUAPx_JFvxoMgt8PNt?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)
